<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ final class CurlCaster { public static function castCurl(\CurlHandle $h, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { foreach (curl_getinfo($h) as $key => $val) { $a[Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.$key] = $val; } return $a; } }
